profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Island Concepts Indonesia Tbk engages in the provision of hospitality services in Indonesia. The company operates through three segments: Catering and Maintenance Services; Villa; and Sale of House and Lot and Condotel. It offers accommodation services; and room rental, cottages, and spa facilities. In addition, the company is involved in the provision of catering and urban facility maintenance for oil and gas and mining sectors; and property services, including offices, hotels, and housing, as well as its facilities. Further, it is involved in real estate activities. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Badung, Indonesia.
